title: NMRDA vs RERA — What Every Nagpur Plot Buyer Must Know
metaTitle: NMRDA vs RERA Explained for Nagpur Plot Buyers | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Confused about NMRDA and RERA approvals? Learn what each means, why both matter, and how to verify them before buying a plot in Nagpur.
author: Mahalaxmi Infra

content.text: When buying a plot in Nagpur, you'll hear two terms repeatedly — NMRDA and RERA. Both are approvals, but they serve completely different purposes. Understanding the difference can save you from a costly legal mistake.

content.heading: What is NMRDA?
content.text: NMRDA stands for Nagpur Metropolitan Region Development Authority. It is the government body responsible for planning and developing land layouts around Nagpur. An NMRDA-sanctioned layout means the government has approved the land for residential use, the roads are planned properly, and the plot demarcations are legally valid. Without NMRDA sanction, a layout cannot legally sell plots.

content.heading: What is RERA?
content.text: RERA stands for Real Estate Regulatory Authority. It is a central government body under the Real Estate (Regulation and Development) Act, 2016. RERA registration means the developer has registered the project with the regulator, disclosed all project details publicly, and is legally accountable for delivery timelines. The MAHA RERA registration number for Mahalaxmi Infra projects is A50500044725 — verifiable at maharera.mahaonline.gov.in.

content.heading: Do You Need Both?
content.text: Yes. NMRDA ensures the land is legally approved for development. RERA ensures the developer is legally accountable to you. A project with only one of these is incomplete from a buyer protection standpoint. All Mahalaxmi Infra projects carry both NMRDA sanction and RERA registration.

content.heading: How to Verify Before Buying
content.text: For NMRDA: Ask the developer for the Layout Sanctioned Plan and the RL (Registrar Letter). For RERA: Visit maharera.mahaonline.gov.in and search the project by RERA number. Always verify before paying any token amount.
Buying a legally clear plot is not just about peace of mind — it also makes you eligible for bank finance of up to 90%. Mahalaxmi Infra provides full documentation transparency at every step.
